_comment: CQNE Redesigned — edit IPs to match your LAN. Copy to every machine.
_note: In the redesigned architecture nodes hold NO quantum state.
All qubits live in the QuantumStateManager on the Control Server.
The control_server_url is what nodes use to register and send heartbeats.
The router_url is optional — used for path-finding if you add routing layers.
For local testing set all URLs to localhost with different ports.
